channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Help wanted: Anthropic hires to head off catastrophe
item.description: Anthropic has warned that its own technology could bring the end of civilization. Check out its latest job listings to understand how. Why it matters:...

item.title: New York offers Democrats a roadmap for data center fight
item.description: New York Governor Kathy Hochul's first-in-the-nation data center moratorium could serve as a model for other Democrats facing midterm challenges.

item.title: New Mexico AG, federal DOJ clash over Epstein records
item.description: A public dispute between New Mexico's attorney general and the U.S. Justice Department escalated Tuesday over records sought in the state's Jeffrey Epstein investigation.

item.title: Trump held Situation Room meeting on massive new Iran strikes
item.description: President Trump held a Situation Room meeting Tuesday to discuss a large-scale offensive in Iran that would be broader than current strikes.
